title: Ghost of the Mountains
description: An interactive conservation storytelling website following a snow leopard named Khangri through branching narrative choices and educational mini-games.

title: Apex Drop
description: A premium skydiving booking platform featuring transparent pricing, experience tiers, and a streamlined multi-step booking wizard.

title: Blue Horizon
description: A conservation-first scuba diving booking platform featuring marine life heatmaps, crowd forecasting, and real-time gear rental cost calculations.

title: Cafe Du Monde
description: An unsolicited homepage redesign concept showcasing visual storytelling, modern web typography, and high-fidelity layout flow for the historic coffee brand.

title: KB Travel
description: A calm, editorial travel planning platform concept featuring retro travel motifs, customized typography, a custom compass cursor, and an interactive itinerary request wizard.
